profile.name: Jiandong Ding (丁建栋)
profile.title: AI Architecture Expert & Senior Algorithm Expert
profile.bio: AI Architecture Expert and Senior Algorithm Expert at Huawei Technologies, focusing on billion-scale recommender systems, LLM serving architecture, edge-cloud collaborative AI, causal inference, and trustworthy ranking.

news.title: Attending ECIR 2026 in the Netherlands for academic exchanges
Paper "Hierarchical and Preference-Aware Generative Recommendations" accepted by TheWebConf (WWW) 2026
Two papers accepted: "RPE4Rec" by WSDM 2026 and "Invariant Feature Learning" by AAAI 2026

researchProjects.title: [WWW 2026] Generative Recs: Hierarchical & Preference-Aware
researchProjects.problem: Flat-sequence generative recommenders overlook the hierarchy of user sessions and introduce noise in long histories.
researchProjects.breakthrough: HPGR uses structure-aware pre-training and preference-guided sparse attention to capture long- and short-term user interests more faithfully.

researchProjects.title: [AAAI 2026] Causal Inference for Watch-time Prediction
researchProjects.shortTitle: Invariant Feature Learning for Watch-time Prediction
researchProjects.problem: Short-video watch time is confounded by duration bias, so longer videos can look better even when user preference is weak.
researchProjects.breakthrough: DIFL uses counterfactual and invariant feature learning to separate genuine user interest from video-duration effects.

researchProjects.title: [WSDM 2026] RPE4Rec: High-Efficiency Dynamic Retrieval
researchProjects.problem: Heavy sequential models are difficult to serve within real-time retrieval budgets over billion-scale dynamic graphs.
researchProjects.breakthrough: RPE4Rec introduces efficient relative position encoding to retain sequential signal while reducing online retrieval latency.

researchProjects.title: [KDD 2024] Low-Rank Compression for CTR Prediction
researchProjects.problem: Large embedding tables dominate CTR model memory and make edge or resource-constrained deployment difficult.
researchProjects.breakthrough: A unified low-rank framework compresses massive embedding modules while preserving ranking performance for production recommendation workloads.

researchProjects.title: [ICSOC 2024] NL2SQL Benchmark for Business Intelligence
researchProjects.problem: Academic NL2SQL benchmarks often miss real enterprise BI constraints such as complex schemas, metrics, and service reliability.
researchProjects.breakthrough: BIS evaluates LLM agents as data intelligence interfaces for translating business questions into production-grade SQL workflows.

researchProjects.title: [NeurIPS 2021] DP-SSL: Robust Semi-supervised Learning
researchProjects.problem: Deep models often require large labeled datasets, which are expensive or impractical in specialized domains.
researchProjects.breakthrough: DP-SSL combines data programming and semi-supervised learning to produce robust models with very limited labeled data.
